ticket.subject: Production down — urgent help needed
ticket.description: Our production environment is completely down. All users are affected. This is a critical outage and we need immediate assistance.

ticket.subject: Invoice question about subscription
ticket.description: I have a billing question about my subscription renewal. The invoice amount differs from what was quoted. Please clarify the charge.

ticket.subject: Login with SSO broken
ticket.description: Single sign-on login stopped working after your last update. Our entire team cannot log in. This is blocking all work immediately.

ticket.subject: Minor cosmetic issue on dashboard
ticket.description: Small cosmetic alignment issue on the main dashboard. The sidebar icons are slightly off-centre. Minor visual suggestion only.

ticket.subject: Bug: form submission fails with exception
ticket.description: Defect found in the contact form. Steps to reproduce: 1. Fill all fields 2. Click Submit 3. Exception thrown. Regression from v2.3.
